CREATE TABLE numbers (a Array(Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT groupArrayIntersect(a) as intersection FROM numbers;
CREATE TABLE t1 (x Array(Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT groupArrayIntersect(x) as intersection FROM t1;
CREATE TABLE t2 (a Array(Int32), b Array(Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT groupArrayIntersect(v.a) FROM (SELECT arrayMap(x -> arrayJoin([x, x + 1, x + 2]), a) as a FROM numbers) as v;
CREATE TABLE t3 (c Array(Int32), d Array(Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT groupArrayIntersect(c) as intersection_c, groupArrayIntersect(d) as intersection_d FROM t3;
